message: dynptr stack storage is being used as ordinary memory: invalid read from stack off -8+0 size 8
required_proof: keep the dynptr object in its verifier-tracked stack slot and use dynptr helpers instead of reading or copying the dynptr storage as ordinary bytes

evidence.detail: invalid read from stack off -8+0 size 8
verifier state shows this stack slot contains dynptr state, but the rejected instruction reads it as ordinary stack bytes

help: Do not copy, read, or pass a dynptr object as ordinary bytes; use dynptr helpers to read data out of the dynptr and keep the dynptr object in its dedicated stack slot.
